# valderas.be

> Personal site of Inti Valderas Caro — UX & Interaction Designer based in Belgium.

## About Inti

Inti Valderas Caro is a UX & Interaction Designer based in Sint-Niklaas, Belgium.
He holds a Master's degree in Interaction Design from LUCA School of Arts and currently
designs digital experiences at VRT MAX (Flanders' public broadcaster) as a UX Design
consultant via iO.

He also serves as a board member at Open Knowledge Belgium and coordinates the
Open Summer of Code — connecting students with open-source civic tech projects.

Through Valderas, he consults on interactive strategy and design, having worked with
organisations like KBC, Smooth Sailing, Engie, and LUCA School of Arts.

## Focus areas

- UX Design & Interaction Design
- Conversational AI
- Data Visualization
- Design Strategy & UX Research
- Design Systems
- Open Source

## Links

- Website: https://valderas.be
- Email: inti@valderas.be
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/inti-valderas-caro
- GitHub: https://github.com/intivalderas

## About this site

This site is a zero-dependency static site built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
No frameworks, no build steps. Designed and directed by Inti, built by Claude Code.

Source code: https://github.com/intivalderas/intivalderas.github.io
